content:
Looking at the Kuwait Fund for Economic Development (
hashtag
#KFAED)-related funds-flow this morning (22/7/26). First, the $10mn donation from the Zain Group to the $100mn Kuwait Emergency Response Fund (
hashtag
#KERF) & then the $3mn grant together with the UNDP to 
hashtag
#Lebanon for 
hashtag
#PV 
hashtag
#SolarEnergy for several public institutions. Further details in the Kuwait Times article below: Emma Morley, Rashaid Al-Bader 
hashtag
#UNDP
